patterns.title: Stale SQL statistics on AX transaction or work tables
patterns.fixPath: Targeted UPDATE STATISTICS in TEST, then approved maintenance window if validation passes.
patterns.validation: Reduced cardinality-related regressions, lower reads/duration for affected query families.

patterns.title: Elevated SQL wait profile requires current-window correlation
patterns.fixPath: Correlate wait spike with top queries, file latency, batch jobs, and business calendar.
patterns.validation: Wait deltas decrease in comparable post-change window.

patterns.title: Query Store high-runtime regression candidate
patterns.fixPath: Compare query plans and runtime windows before/after deployment; avoid plan forcing without rollback.
patterns.validation: P95 duration, CPU, and logical reads improve without new high-risk plans.
